listings.description: Gorgeous one story Sherwood model , nicely landscaped on an 16,117 square ft. lot, located in a cul-de-sac with mountain views. This model boasts an open floor plan, eat in kitchen with plenty of cabinet space. This home has 3 bedrooms with custom shutters, luxury vinyl plank floors, quartz countertops and stainless steel appliances. Oversize primary has dual sinks, custom shower and walk in closet. Home is complete with a large covered patio to gaze at the stars and mountains. Sun City Summerlin is a +55 plus community providing an array of resort style amenities to its residents. There are 4 clubhouses, 3 golf courses, 3 fitness rooms, restaurants, indoor/outdoor pool/spas, tennis and a theatre. No need to leave your home with all these amazing amenities.

listings.description: Stunning Remodeled, Open Concept, three Bedroom (or two plus office) home. ALL NEW KITCHEN Cabinets, granite, Appliances. New Luxury Vinyl flooring, Designer Tiled Fireplace, new cabinetry and Counters in both Baths. Beautifully Tiled Shower and bath, new fixtures, new paint inside and out. Large, covered patio and larger lot with mature trees, new outdoor water system. This is the most reasonable three bedroom that's completely remodeled and fantastic... come see this !

listings.description: $55,000 PRICE IMPROVEMENT!!!!! Resort Style living in your BEAUTIFUL Belmont model! Spacious 3 bedroom offers great sized primary bedroom with tons of closet space This newly painted t/o. When you enter vaulted ceiling beauty you are "HOME". Stainless steel appliances and granite counter tops and a double oven in your upgraded kitchen over looks the bay windowed breakfast nook and separate family room. Open all those wood shutters for a bright and cheery day. Or go out to your covered patio overlooking that big back yard. Live that exceptional life style that has made Sun City Summerlin one of the most sought after 55+ Communities. It's great to have the newly epoxy coated floor in the extended 2 car garage with it's own golf cart parking because of the 3 golf courses just a golf cart ride down the street. Or visit the multiple indoor and out door pools or  the state of the art fitness centers. Ride to the club houses with a zillion social activities or go play pickle ball and tennis courts. It just waiting for you. While your out, for those security minded we have already installed your front and rear security doors and Rolladen Shutters.  New paint outside and ready to go!! Remember in Sun city Summerlin you are soooo close to all that shopping, dining and medical facilities especially such easy freeway access!  Your other 2 bedrooms will work for those visiting family and friends, or for that home office. Several hotels are close by also.

listings.description: Golf course frontage home designed for entertaining nestled in Vibrant Sun City Summerlin 55+ community. Relax and Enjoy panoramic views of Palm Valley Course & mountains from your inground spa with rock waterfall. Home is meticulous, landcaped grounds and patio beautifuly maintained. Gated Courtyard Entry, Custom Double Doors, Spacious Living room+dining area+family room with lots of natural light and fabulous views. High ceilings, Archways, Shutters throughout, tile floors main areas, hardwood floors in bedrooms. Primary bedroom separate from others, remodeled bathrooms. 3rd bedrm w/builtin desk unit used as office. Kitchen w/breakfast nook+bar counter, stainless steel appliances, double electric convection oven, lots of cabinets. Laundry room, Garage w/Golf Cart parking space, epoxy floors, cabinets. Enjoy abundance of Sun City amenities, clubs, activities, 3 premier golf courses, indoor/outdoor pools/spas, tennis, pickleball, fitness centers, clubhouses, restaurants+so much more!

listings.address: 2808 Tumble Creek Ct, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description:
Welcome to Sun City Summerlin, one of Las Vegas’ premier 55+ communities. This well-maintained home
offers 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and a functional floor plan designed for comfort and everyday living.
Enjoy spacious formal living and dining rooms, perfect for entertaining. The home is filled with natural light
and enhanced by energy-saving roller shades for added efficiency. The kitchen flows seamlessly into the
main living areas, creating an ideal layout for daily living and gatherings. The primary suite offers a
peaceful retreat, while two additional bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, hobbies, or a home office.
The backyard features a covered patio, mature landscaping, and a private putting green—perfect for
relaxing or entertaining. Enjoy resort-style amenities including golf, clubhouses, fitness centers, walking
trails, pools, and social activities just minutes away. Conveniently located near shopping, dining, medical
facilities, and easy freeway access.

listings.address: 9100 Garden View Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Fabulous Fully Furnished Hancock Model with 2 bedroom 2 bath plus Den. Kitchen with Stainless Steel Appliances, Granite counters. Breakfast Bar and Nook. Large Dining Room.Living Room Combo. Den/Office could be 3rd Bedroom. 2 Car Garage plus Work Shop. Extra Large Patio.

listings.address: 9149 Villa Ridge Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Step into resort-style living in the heart of Sun City Summerlin. This FULLY REMODELED, single-story home sits along the fairway with SWEEPING golf course and mountain views. Inside, no detail was overlooked — wood plank flooring flows throughout, leading to a gourmet kitchen with quartz countertops, a large island, and stainless-steel appliances including 3 OVENS. The spacious family room opens to a beautifully landscaped backyard perfect for entertaining, with jaw-dropping views at every turn. The primary suite is a true retreat with a spa-like walk-in shower, soaking tub,  dual vanities, and large walk in closet. The community boasts multiple clubhouses, fitness center, pools, spa, tennis, pickleball, and 80+ clubs and interest groups. Conveniently located near The Strip, top medical facilities, and Downtown Summerlin. Luxury 55+ living at its finest — tour your next home today!

listings.address: 3112 Archwood Way, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Newly renovated 3-bedroom, 2,133 sq ft home in the highly sought-after Sun City Summerlin active senior community. This standout property features a brand-new primary bedroom and bathroom addition, plantation shutters throughout, and one of the few fully enclosed oversized backyards you'll find in Sun City — a rare find in this neighborhood. Inside, the updates are clean and move-in ready. Outside, you're living the resort lifestyle with access to golf, pickleball courts, pools, and all the amenities Sun City Summerlin is known for. Downtown Summerlin is just 15 minutes away for all of your shopping and dining needs. If you've been waiting for a home in Sun City that actually has space, privacy, and the upgrades to match — this is it.

listings.address: 2401 Sierra Sage St, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Hancock Model in Sun City Summerlin! This well-appointed home features an open-concept floor plan, natural light, shutters throughout, and tile and laminate flooring. Cul-de-sac with no neighbors behind. 3 bedrooms, the layout offers both comfort and flexibility. Kitchen has solid-surface countertops, breakfast bar, and stainless-steel appliances. Spacious primary suite, bay window, dual sinks, makeup vanity, accessible separate tub and shower, and large walk-in closet. Step outside to an oversized covered veranda overlooking the beautifully landscaped 13,939 sq ft lot—perfect for relaxing or entertaining—complete with partial mountain and Strip views. The oversized garage, built-in cabinetry for added storage. Located in the premier 55+ Sun City Summerlin community, residents enjoy access to 3 golf courses, indoor and outdoor pools, fitness centers, pickleball courts, and a vibrant social calendar. All just minutes from Downtown Summerlin’s shopping, dining, and entertainment.

listings.address: 2900 Golfside Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: This exquisite home is perfect for those who adore both indoor & outdoor entertainment, this property is designed to impress. The first thing to greet you is synthetic grass lawn & pavered driveway & walkways. Then pass into the gated & expanded courtyard. Once inside discover a lavish interior that has been carefully curated for elegance & functionality. The kitchen features quartz countertops, a quartz covered island w/waterfall sides, tiled backsplash & stainless steel appliances, it is a culinary dream. The house is equipped w/Smart Cameras, Low-E windows, Plantation Shutters & a newer HVAC system emphasizing efficiency & modernity. The owners suite features a walk-in closet and redesigned twin sink & cabinet en suite. The Guest Bathroom has also been redesigned & remodeled. The third bedroom has been equipped w/a built office for added convenience. The backyard is an entertainer's dream w/A Built In BBQ Island, artificial turf, & extended patio cover. This home truly has it all.

listings.address: 10805 Clarion Ln, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Welcome to your elevated breath taking desert retreat in Sun City Summerlin—perfect for the 55+ buyer seeking style, comfort, and an active lifestyle. This fully remodeled, move-in-ready home showcases fresh interior paint, custom white shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, luxury vinyl plank flooring, plush bedroom carpet, 5.5” baseboards, stainless steel appliances, and sleek modern fixtures throughout. The open-concept design is ideal for entertaining or unwinding after a day of golf or enjoying the community’s premier amenities. The spacious primary suite offers a private escape with a spa-inspired bath featuring a freestanding soaking tub, oversized step-in shower, and a cozy fireplace. Step outside to a beautifully landscaped backyard, perfect for soaking up the Las Vegas sunshine. Conveniently located near golf, dining, shopping, and entertainment. Experience the vibrant, resort-style living you’ve earned—welcome home!

listings.address: 2825 Billy Casper Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: This fully remodeled single-story home in Sun City Summerlin is the rare find that checks every box, including a fully paid-off solar system that keeps your monthly costs as impressive as the views. Inside, luxury vinyl plank flooring flows seamlessly throughout, setting the tone for a home where every finish was chosen with care. The gourmet kitchen features quartz countertops, a large island, and premium stainless-steel appliances — equally suited for quiet mornings and lively dinner parties. A custom fireplace anchors the family room, while 16-foot stackable sliding glass doors open fully to a beautifully landscaped backyard sitting right on the fairway, with golf course and mountain views that never get old. The primary suite delivers the kind of calm you'll look forward to every night, with spa like walk-in shower, dual vanities, and custom his-and-her closets. Outside your door, Sun City Summerlin's award winning clubhouse, fitness center, and vibrant social scene round out a lifestyle that's genuinely hard to beat. Luxury 55+ living with the utility bills to match.

listings.address: 3108 Endeavor Ct, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description: Beautifully remodeled 3-bedroom, 2-bath single-story in the heart of Sun City Summerlin’s 55+ community! Set on a rare 1/3 acre cul-de-sac lot, this home features vaulted ceilings, recessed lighting, abundant natural light, new wood laminate flooring, and ceiling fans in every room. The fully updated kitchen boasts quartz counters, gold fixtures, ample cabinetry, a large breakfast bar, and matching KitchenAid appliances. Bathrooms shine with new tile, glass enclosures, and a spa-like primary with walk-in closet, stand-alone tub, and separate shower. Enjoy year-round comfort with 2 newer AC units (2019) and an electric fireplace. The oversized backyard offers desert landscaping, a covered patio, and a turf putting green with 4 holes—perfect for entertaining. With a newly replumbed indoor laundry room, quiet cul-de-sac location, and access to resort-style amenities, this home blends luxury and convenience in one of Summerlin’s most desirable active adult communities.

listings.address: 2725 Echo Mesa Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89134
listings.description:
**Coming Soon** Fully renovated Sun City Summerlin home with spectacular golf course and mountain views! Offering 2,500+ sq ft with 3 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms, this exceptional residence has undergone a major structural and systems transformation, creating a modern living experience within one of Las Vegas’ premier 55+ communities. Features include redesigned open-concept living, expanded spaces, high ceilings, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow throughout. Extensive updates include plumbing, electrical, HVAC, insulation, windows, doors, and high-end finishes throughout.
The chef’s kitchen features an oversized island, custom cabinetry, luxury appliances, premium granite countertops, elevated lighting, and expansive entertaining spaces. Additional highlights include dramatic panel sliders, covered patio with built-in BBQ, spacious dining areas, and panoramic golf course and mountain views. The primary retreat offers a spa-inspired en-suite with steam shower, dual sinks, bidet, and spacious walk-in closet. Additional features include a guest en-suite, office/optional 3rd bedroom with a private entrance, elevated fixtures and hardware, and integrated contemporary design throughout.
Sun City Summerlin offers 3 golf courses and 4 clubhouse/community centers featuring resort-style amenities, social clubs, indoor and outdoor pools, tennis, pickleball, fitness facilities, hobby rooms, and an active social lifestyle. Enjoy close proximity to walking and hiking trails, dining, shopping, entertainment, and Red Rock Canyon. Designed with lock-and-leave luxury in mind, this exceptional property blends modern comfort, functionality, and upscale living within the heart of Summerlin. Photos are for representative purposes only.
